summary: Iteration 10 - Budgeted/Planned Hours Feature Testing Complete. All 6 test cases passed. Budget can be set at project and phase level. Time Tracking tab displays budget vs actual hours. White screen bug on project update is FIXED.

minor.issue: Console warning: date format mismatch 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss' vs 'yyyy-MM-dd' for phase dates - cosmetic issue only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Project creation via Wizard with budget: Set 600h project budget and phase budgets (Discovery: 200h, Build: 400h) - data persisted correctly
Project update with budget (white screen bug regression): Changed FX1 budget to 300h, NO white screen crash, toast showed 'Project updated successfully'
Budget tracking view on ProjectDetail: Time Tracking tab shows Total Budget (500h), Total Actual (0h), Budget Variance (-500h), Budget Used (0%) cards
Phase-level budget tracking: Phase Breakdown table shows Budget column with Discovery (150h) and Build (350h)
Edit project phases with budgets: Budget input field visible in edit dialog, phases can have budgeted_hours
Holiday delete regression test: Created and deleted test holiday successfully, toast showed 'Holiday deleted successfully'
Backend API: GET /api/reports/planned-vs-actual/project/{id} returns budget data with budget_variance and budget_used_percentage
Wizard Review Step: Shows budget in Project Charter section and phase budgets in Phases section
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Budget_Project_E2E (600h budget, 2 phases with 200h and 400h) for testing, created and deleted TEST_Holiday_Delete_Test for regression testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Budget feature is complete and working. Key test IDs: data-testid='wizard-budget' (project budget in wizard), data-testid='wizard-phase-budget-{index}' (phase budget in wizard), data-testid='project-budget-input' (edit form), data-testid='tab-time-tracking' (Time Tracking tab). Budget Test Project has 500h budget with Discovery (150h) and Build (350h) phases. FX1 budget updated to 300h. The planned-vs-actual report endpoint returns budget_variance and budget_used_percentage fields.

project_edit_with_budget.white_screen_bug: FIXED - No crash on project update

FX1 - AI Auditing Module.note: Budget updated from 200h to 300h during testing
